task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Chevrolet Corvette (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $68300.00 and wholesale is $51600.00. Product features: Mid-engine sports car with 6.2L V8 producing 495 horsepower. Reference: https://www.chevrolet.com/performance/corvette

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Chevrolet Corvette. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Chevrolet Corvette. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
